creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #7)
Now for the second test - same files with random generated names.

Here is how its being done:

# find books -type d | while read I; do mkdir -p TEST/$I;done
# find books -type f | while read I; do cp "${I}" "TEST/$( dirname ${I} )/${RANDOM}.${RANDOM}.txt" ;done

... and the result is the same broken msdosfs as seen below:

# du -sm /media/mmcsd0/books

I will also do a thir test with also randomized names for directories and files, but I doubt it will change anything ...

Regards,
vermaden
